simple_types.name: Msg_Id
simple_types.code: type Msg_Id is mod 2 ** 24 with Size => 24;

simple_types.name: Timestamp_Type
simple_types.code: type Timestamp_Type is mod 2 ** 48 with Size => 48;

array_types.name: Data_Buffer
array_types.code: type Data_Buffer is array (Positive range <>) of Interfaces.Unsigned_8;

array_types.code:

  with Component_Size => 16;

array_types.code:
type Long_Float_Array is array (Natural range <>) of Raw_Long_Float
  with Component_Size => 64;

array_types.name: Short_Float_Array
array_types.code:
type Short_Float_Array is array (Natural range <>) of Raw_Float

array_types.name: Signature_Key
array_types.code:

  Interfaces.Unsigned_8;

  with Component_Size => 16;

subprograms.name: Get_Message_Information

documentation.description: Same as above but do not check V2 signature

subprograms.name: Get_Message_Information

documentation.description:
Returns information about the current message in the buffer.
Should be called only after Parse_Byte returned True.
Timestamp contains 48 bits of the timestamp (others set ot 0)
Signature is set to Unknown if SHA256 is not used. In another case it is
set to True/False depends on whether the checksum is valid for the
message.

subprograms.name: Get_Message_Information

the Signature.

subprograms.name: Parse_Byte
subprograms.code:
function Parse_Byte
  (Self  : in out Connection;
   Value : Interfaces.Unsigned_8)
   return Boolean

documentation.description:
Add the Value to the buffer and return True if a message has been read
(collected all message data)
